questions.question: What are the four main directions called?
questions.answer: They are called cardinal directions: North, South, East, and West.

questions.question: In which direction does the Sun rise every morning?
questions.answer: The Sun rises in the East.

questions.question: In which direction does the Sun set every evening?
questions.answer: The Sun sets in the West.

questions.question: If you stand facing the rising Sun, which direction is behind you?
questions.answer: The West is behind you.

questions.question: If you face the East, which direction is to your left?
questions.answer: The North is to your left.

questions.question: If you face the East, which direction is to your right?
questions.answer: The South is to your right.

questions.question: What is a compass used for?
questions.answer: A compass is an instrument used to find directions.

questions.question: What is the name of the magnetic needle in a compass?
questions.answer: It is simply called the compass needle.

questions.question: Which direction does the colored end of a compass needle always point to?
questions.answer: It always points to the North.

questions.question: What is a map?
questions.answer: A map is a drawing of a place or the earth on a flat surface.

questions.question: On a standard map, which direction is usually at the top?
questions.answer: The North is usually at the top of a map.

questions.question: Which direction is usually at the bottom of a map?
questions.answer: The South is usually at the bottom of a map.

questions.question: On a map, which side represents the East?
questions.answer: The right side represents the East.

questions.question: On a map, which side represents the West?
questions.answer: The left side represents the West.

questions.question: Why do travelers use a compass?
questions.answer: To make sure they are moving in the right direction and don't get lost.

questions.question: Can we find directions at night using the stars?
questions.answer: Yes, people use the Pole Star to find the North direction.

questions.question: Which direction is exactly opposite to North?
questions.answer: South is exactly opposite to North.

questions.question: Which direction is exactly opposite to East?
questions.answer: West is exactly opposite to East.

questions.question: What are the directions between the main ones called (like North-East)?
questions.answer: They are called intermediate directions or sub-directions.

questions.question: What is the direction between North and East?
questions.answer: The direction is North-East.

questions.question: What is the direction between South and West?
questions.answer: The direction is South-West.

questions.question: How many main (cardinal) directions are there?
questions.answer: There are four main directions.

questions.question: Does the sun always rise in the same direction?
questions.answer: Yes, it always rises in the East.

questions.question: What do sailors use to find their way in the middle of the sea?
questions.answer: They use a compass and modern tools like GPS.

questions.question: Why is it helpful to know directions in a new city?
questions.answer: It helps us find places like schools, hospitals, or parks easily.
